1824170.name: Christmas Mansion
1824170.description:
Welcome to Christmas Mansion!

Welcome to Christmas Mansion, a cozy and festive holiday match-3 puzzle adventure where snow sparkles, gingerbread crunches, and every match brings the spirit of Christmas to life.

 

A Cozy Winter Match-3 Wonderland

Escape into a world of twinkling lights, snowy rooftops, and festive melodies.

Match candy canes, ornaments, stockings, stars, and gingerbread cookies in hundreds of levels. Every puzzle brings you closer to rebuilding and decorating the Winterland!

Perfect for relaxing by the fireplace anytime you need a cheerful break.

 

Swap, Match & Make Holiday Magic

Use simple match-3 mechanics - swap, drag, and match - to create colorful combos and festive explosions! Blow away snow piles, melt icy tiles, and clear all obstacles as you progress through magical winter puzzles.

 

Restore & Decorate the Winter Lands

Swap pieces, beat levels and help Elf decorate the winter lands.

An exciting adventure and quests wait for you. Build a cozy little cottage on the hill and a cookie factory, fire up the oven and get baking! Think you could whip up a nice batch of muffins? Build an ornament factory, ski workshop and complete dozens of other quests to prepare a fantastic holiday party. Winter has tons of fun in stock for you.

 

Create the Gingerbread decoration telling the tale of Hansel and Gretel!

Clean the scene first!

Start building!

Build the witch's castle!

Blast through the puzzles and have a fantastic Christmas holiday again!

Magical Features You’ll Love

• Dozens of quests to complete.

• Powerful boosters and festive bonuses.

• Hundreds of joyful holiday match-3 levels with new obstacles.

• Cozy, cheerful visuals and relaxing seasonal music.

 

The Perfect Holiday Puzzle Adventure

Whether you love Christmas games, decoration adventures, or classic match-3 puzzles, Christmas Mansion brings all the winter cheer to your screen!

Warm cocoa energy + relaxing puzzles + festive decorating =
The ultimate Christmas escape!

Download Christmas Mansion today and let the holiday magic begin!
1824170.supported_languages: 英语, 荷兰语, 法语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙, 乌克兰语
